results.title: Tottenham join hunt for ‘world class’ Barcelona forward to partner Kroupi in devastating new attack – report
results.description: Having built from back to front for De Zerbi so far this summer, Spurs are now looking to upgrade their attack and reports claim they are very much in the mix to secure a bargain signing from Barcelona

results.title: Burgos, Ramos rule Elite as Santiagos shine at 5150 Bohol
results.description: PANGLAO, Bohol – Erika Burgos and Dayshaun Ramos reaffirmed their status as the country’s top Olympic-distance triathletes by ruling the Filipino Elite division, while Ines Santiago and Mervin Santiago emerged as the overall champions in the landmark 10th Sun Life 5150 Bohol Triathlon here on Sunday. Burgos followed up her inaugural 5150 Guimaras triumph with another [...]

results.description: ERLING HAALAND hailed superstar pal Jude Bellingham’s match-winning performance - and now wants England to win the World Cup.
